## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.41

### 🎥 Camera WebRTC
- Continues prerelease camera testing with the live-view command path aligned to the Android app data-channel startup flow.
- Resets the camera peer state when the camera reports `PEER_OUT` before the first frame, so a stale peer does not leave the camera stuck on the next attempt.

### 🚨 Device Actions
- Aligns standalone XS01-WX self-test payloads with the Android app path while keeping SBS50-linked XS01-WX behavior on the second-generation base-station path.

### 🧭 Camera Events
- Adds camera motion and AI-detection entities for APK-backed event types such as person, pet, vehicle, package, and other detection.
- Parses AI event data only from APK-backed fields (`eventItems`, `eventObjectType`, and `lastType`) instead of broad guessed aliases.

### 🔎 Debug Logging
- Keeps camera debug logging focused on WebRTC signaling, data-channel messages, and transport state needed for follow-up camera reports.
